auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ngrok Admin API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create your first key on the ngrok Dashboard API Keys page: https://dashboard.ngrok.com/api/keys.

actions.name: get_endpoint
actions.description: Fetch one ngrok endpoint by ID and return the upstream endpoint object.

endpoint_id.description: Unique identifier of the ngrok endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for fetching one ngrok endpoint by ID.

type.description: Endpoint type returned by ngrok, such as edge or cloud.

public_url.description: Public URL currently serving this endpoint.

url.description: API URL or frontend URL returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

description.description: Human-readable description configured on this endpoint.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this endpoint.

host.description: Host portion returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

name.description: User-defined endpoint name returned by ngrok.

port.description: Port returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

region.description: Region identifier returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

scheme.description: Scheme returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

hostport.description: Hostport returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tcp_addr.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

principal.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

edge.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

domain.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tunnel.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tunnel_session.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

upstream_url.description: Upstream URL forwarded to by this endpoint, when returned.

upstream_protocol.description: Upstream protocol used by the ngrok agent, when returned.

traffic_policy.description: Traffic policy attached to this endpoint, when returned.

pooling_enabled.description: Whether pooling is enabled for this endpoint.

actions.name: get_reserved_domain
actions.description: Fetch one ngrok reserved domain by ID and return the upstream domain object.

reserved_domain_id.description: Unique identifier of the ngrok reserved domain.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for fetching one ngrok reserved domain by ID.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this reserved domain.

domain.description: Hostname reserved on the ngrok account.

region.description: Deprecated region field returned by ngrok, when present.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this reserved domain.

description.description: Human-readable description configured on this reserved domain.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

certificate.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

cname_target.description: DNS CNAME target for this reserved domain.

acme_challenge_cname_target.description: DNS CNAME target used for ACME validation, when returned.

value.description: Resolver target value returned by ngrok.

resolves_to.description: Resolver targets configured on this reserved domain, when returned.

authority.description: Certificate authority used by automatic management.

private_key_type.description: Private key type used by automatic management.

certificate_management_policy.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate management policy.

renews_at.description: Timestamp when the managed certificate renews, when returned.

msg.description: Status or error message returned for the certificate job.

error_code.description: Certificate job error code returned by ngrok, when present.

retries_at.description: Timestamp when ngrok will retry the certificate job, when present.

provisioning_job.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate provisioning job.

certificate_management_status.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate management status.

actions.name: list_endpoints
actions.description: List active ngrok endpoints for the current account, with optional pagination and CEL filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. ngrok accepts values from 1 to 100.

before_id.description: Pagination cursor that requests results created before this resource ID.

filter.description: CEL filter expression used by ngrok to filter the returned resources.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing ngrok endpoints.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for the endpoints collection.

type.description: Endpoint type returned by ngrok, such as edge or cloud.

public_url.description: Public URL currently serving this endpoint.

url.description: API URL or frontend URL returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

description.description: Human-readable description configured on this endpoint.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this endpoint.

host.description: Host portion returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

name.description: User-defined endpoint name returned by ngrok.

port.description: Port returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

region.description: Region identifier returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

scheme.description: Scheme returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

hostport.description: Hostport returned by ngrok for this endpoint.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tcp_addr.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

principal.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

edge.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

domain.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tunnel.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tunnel_session.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

upstream_url.description: Upstream URL forwarded to by this endpoint, when returned.

upstream_protocol.description: Upstream protocol used by the ngrok agent, when returned.

traffic_policy.description: Traffic policy attached to this endpoint, when returned.

pooling_enabled.description: Whether pooling is enabled for this endpoint.

endpoints.description: Resources returned by ngrok for this page.

anyOf.description: URI of the next page, or null when there is no next page.

before_id.description: Pagination cursor that requests results created before this resource ID.

filter.description: CEL filter expression used by ngrok to filter the returned resources.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing ngrok reserved domains.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for the reserved_domains collection.
Canonical ngrok API URI for this reserved domain.

domain.description: Hostname reserved on the ngrok account.

region.description: Deprecated region field returned by ngrok, when present.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this reserved domain.

description.description: Human-readable description configured on this reserved domain.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

certificate.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

cname_target.description: DNS CNAME target for this reserved domain.

acme_challenge_cname_target.description: DNS CNAME target used for ACME validation, when returned.

value.description: Resolver target value returned by ngrok.

resolves_to.description: Resolver targets configured on this reserved domain, when returned.

authority.description: Certificate authority used by automatic management.

private_key_type.description: Private key type used by automatic management.

certificate_management_policy.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate management policy.

renews_at.description: Timestamp when the managed certificate renews, when returned.

msg.description: Status or error message returned for the certificate job.

error_code.description: Certificate job error code returned by ngrok, when present.

retries_at.description: Timestamp when ngrok will retry the certificate job, when present.

provisioning_job.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate provisioning job.

certificate_management_status.description: ngrok reserved domain certificate management status.

actions.name: list_tunnel_sessions
actions.description: List online ngrok tunnel sessions for the current account with pagination and CEL filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. ngrok accepts values from 1 to 100.

before_id.description: Pagination cursor that requests results created before this resource ID.

filter.description: CEL filter expression used by ngrok to filter the returned resources.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing ngrok tunnel sessions.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for the tunnel_sessions collection.
Canonical ngrok API URI for this tunnel session.

agent_version.description: ngrok agent version serving this session.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

credential.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

ip.description: Source IP address of the tunnel session.

os.description: Operating system reported by the ngrok agent.

region.description: ngrok region where this session is connected.

transport.description: Transport protocol used by this tunnel session.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this session.

tunnel_sessions.description: Resources returned by ngrok for this page.

anyOf.description: URI of the next page, or null when there is no next page.

actions.name: list_tunnels
actions.description: List online ngrok tunnels for the current account with pagination support.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. ngrok accepts values from 1 to 100.

before_id.description: Pagination cursor that requests results created before this resource ID.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing ngrok tunnels.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for the tunnels collection.

region.description: Region where this tunnel is running.

forwards_to.description: Upstream address that this tunnel forwards traffic to.

public_url.description: Public URL currently serving this tunnel.

metadata.description: User-defined metadata attached to this tunnel.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

endpoint.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

tunnel_session.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

uri.description: Canonical ngrok API URI for this resource.

items.description: Reference to another ngrok API resource.

backends.description: Backends attached to this tunnel group, when returned.

labels.description: Label map returned by ngrok for this tunnel.

tunnels.description: Resources returned by ngrok for this page.

anyOf.description: URI of the next page, or null when there is no next page.
